items.title: Looking Up at Constable’s Sky
items.summary: The British painter’s four seasons, the New Museum’s new director, and which Surrealist painter influenced a soccer jersey?

items.title: Valerie Brathwaite, Abstract Sculptor of the Natural World, Dies at 87
items.summary: The artist found inspiration in the geography, vegetation, and wildlife of her home countries of Trinidad and Tobago and Venezuela.

items.title: Collin van der Sluijs’ ‘Wanderland’ Imagines a Vast Ecosystem Encompassing the Momentous and Mundane
items.summary: The Dutch artist reflects on loss, grief, and the therapeutic powers of nature in his first presentation at Joy Machine. Do stories and artists like this matter to you? Become a Colossal Member today…

items.title: Massimiliano Gioni Named Director of New Museum
items.summary: The institution’s former artistic director succeeds Lisa Phillips, who announced her retirement last fall.
